svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="kd-review 收敛机制" id="kdreview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-664" dy="-185" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1280" pageHeight="760" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="/kd-review:审查的本质是收敛问题。串行是慢的根因,所以全程 streaming 并行,直到连续 3 轮零任何问题才停" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1200" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2563eb;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="① 并行审查
21 个窄范围 bucket 同时启动
每个 agent 只审 1-5 个文件,独立 worktree" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="280" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2563eb;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="② Streaming 修复
结果到达即派修复 agent
不等待全部审查完成,🔴 阻断直接修" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="280" x="380" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2563eb;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="③ 收敛循环
clean_continuous ≥ 3 才退出
至少 1 轮全量审查,每 5 轮强制全量" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="280" x="720" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="✅ 自动提交 + 推送
测试门禁全绿后" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="1050" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FL1" edge="1" parent="1" source="S1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="S2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FL2" edge="1" parent="1" source="S2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="S3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FL3" edge="1" parent="1" source="S3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="S4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LOOP" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="未收敛 → 回到①,只重审上一轮出问题的 bucket(增量)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="700" x="40" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SECT" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#0f766e;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="关键设计:墙钟时间 = max(所有审查) + max(所有修复),不是 sum" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="700" x="40" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TG_TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="提交前硬门禁:编译 → 单测+覆盖率 → API 契约检查 → E2E,任一失败自动派修复循环(最多 3 轮),全绿才提交" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="1200" x="40" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TG1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="编译验证
mvn compile / pnpm build" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="40" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TG2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="单测 + 覆盖率门禁
行 95% / 分支 85%" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="260" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TG3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="API 契约检查
前端调用 vs 后端 @*Mapping" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="480" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TG4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="P0 E2E 最终确认
交易 + 运营后台" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="700" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TG5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef2f2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;" value="E2E 环境不可用
禁止 skip / 禁止占位测试
标 🔴 不提交" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="920" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TGE1" edge="1" parent="1" source="TG1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#64748b;" target="TG2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TGE2" edge="1" parent="1" source="TG2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#64748b;" target="TG3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TGE3" edge="1" parent="1" source="TG3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#64748b;" target="TG4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TGE4" edge="1" parent="1" source="TG4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#dc2626;dashed=1;" target="TG5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DATA_TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="实战收敛时间线(联合套卡模块审查,11 轮收敛)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="1200" x="40" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TH" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontFamily=monospace;" value="轮次 | 策略 | 审查 | 修复 | 🔴 | 🟡 | 连续零问题
R1 | 全量并行 | 21 | 13 | 38 | 110 | 0
R2 | streaming 修复 | 8 | 8 | 14 | 12 | 0
R3 | 增量重审 | 5 | 3 | 1 | 3 | 0
R4 | 修复残留 | — | 3 | 0 | 0 | 1
R5 | 快速扫描 | 3 | 1 | 0 | 0 | 2
R6 | 横切再审 | 2 | 2 | 1 | 0 | 0
R7-R11 | 递增验证 | 1 | — | 0 | 0 | 1→5" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="600" x="340" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#0f766e;fontSize=11;" value="前 3 轮(全量审查 + 修复 + 验证)是核心价值所在 —— 38 个 🔴 + 110 个 🟡 全在 R1-R3 消化" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="1200" x="40" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#0f766e;fontSize=11;" value="R7+ 用 grep 直接验证代替启动 agent,wall-clock 显著缩短 —— 收敛后期不需要重型 agent" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="1200" x="40" y="584" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="一次事故催生的设计:删掉的并发保护代码、调用不存在端点的前端代码,编译过但测试没跑 —— 所以测试门禁是硬前置" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="1200" x="40" y="608" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 600px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: /kd-review:审查的本质是收敛问题。串行是慢的根因,所以全程 streaming 并行,直到连续 3 轮零任何问题才停

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 100px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
① 并行审查
21 个窄范围 bucket 同时启动
每个 agent 只审 1-5 个文件,独立 worktree

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 100px; margin-left: 341px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
② Streaming 修复
结果到达即派修复 agent
不等待全部审查完成,🔴 阻断直接修

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 100px; margin-left: 681px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
③ 收敛循环
clean_continuous ≥ 3 才退出
至少 1 轮全量审查,每 5 轮强制全量

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 188px; height: 1px; padding-top: 100px; margin-left: 1011px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
✅ 自动提交 + 推送
测试门禁全绿后

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 162px; margin-left: 350px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #dc2626;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#dc2626, #ff8a8a); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 未收敛 → 回到①,只重审上一轮出问题的 bucket(增量)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 197px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0f766e;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0f766e, #56aea7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 关键设计:墙钟时间 = max(所有审查) + max(所有修复),不是 sum

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 237px; margin-left: 600px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 提交前硬门禁:编译 → 单测+覆盖率 → API 契约检查 → E2E,任一失败自动派修复循环(最多 3 轮),全绿才提交

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 290px; margin-left: 1px;

div.div:
编译验证
mvn compile / pnpm build

div.div:
单测 + 覆盖率门禁
行 95% / 分支 85%

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 290px; margin-left: 441px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
API 契约检查
前端调用 vs 后端 @*Mapping

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 290px; margin-left: 661px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;

div.div:
P0 E2E 最终确认
交易 + 运营后台

div.div:
E2E 环境不可用
禁止 skip / 禁止占位测试
标 🔴 不提交

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 347px; margin-left: 600px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 实战收敛时间线(联合套卡模块审查,11 轮收敛)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 377px; margin-left: 600px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: monospace; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 547px; margin-left: 600px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #0f766e;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0f766e, #56aea7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 前 3 轮(全量审查 + 修复 + 验证)是核心价值所在 —— 38 个 🔴 + 110 个 🟡 全在 R1-R3 消化

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 571px; margin-left: 600px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #0f766e;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0f766e, #56aea7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: R7+ 用 grep 直接验证代替启动 agent,wall-clock 显著缩短 —— 收敛后期不需要重型 agent

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 595px; margin-left: 600px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #dc2626;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#dc2626, #ff8a8a); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 一次事故催生的设计:删掉的并发保护代码、调用不存在端点的前端代码,编译过但测试没跑 —— 所以测试门禁是硬前置

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
